overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 transitioning from a dark rainy shack interior to the sun-baked Badlands desert. The player character walks through a dusty shanty settlement toward a building with outdoor seating, with towering corporate skyscrapers visible in the distant haze.

screen fades to black transitioning from dark interior to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: Inside a dark wooden shack, the camera faces a rain-covered window with hands pressed against the glass. Heavy rain streams down the window as the scene fades to black, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the outside world.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert shanty town settlement with makeshift wooden structures and distant corporate towers

passes by a red pickup truck parked on the left side of the dirt path
approaches the stairs of the main building with outdoor patio seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert settlement toward a central building with outdoor patio seating

large satellite dish mounted on the roof of the main building

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the bright desert sun, the scene opens into a wide shanty town with the Arasaka towers looming in the distant smog. The camera walks past a red pickup truck and wooden shacks toward a central building with outdoor seating under white umbrellas, eventually approaching the wooden stairs of the main structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic gloom of a rainy interior to the expansive, sun-baked openness of a desert settlement. It begins inside a dark wooden shack, where the camera gazes through a rain-streaked window with hands pressed against the glass. As the scene fades to black, the sheltered interior gives way to a sudden burst of bright desert sunlight, revealing a wide shanty town under a smoggy sky. The camera then advances through the settlement, passing a red pickup truck and weathered wooden shacks while the towering Arasaka skyscrapers loom in the distant haze. The movement finally leads toward a central building with white outdoor umbrellas, ending as the camera approaches the wooden stairs of the main structure.
